name: Window Property
desc: Updates a single property in a container (enchantment level, furnace burn time, brewing progress, etc.).
notes: Property IDs vary by container type. Enchantment table: 0=top level, 1=middle, 2=bottom. Furnace: 0=burn time, 1=current item progress, 2=total cook time. Brewing stand: 0=brew time. Beacon: 0=power level.

implementation.overview: S31 updates a container property. Most importantly used for enchantment table levels (properties 0-2 = the 3 offered enchantment levels). AutoEnchant modules read S31 to decide which slot to click via C11. No other module in the examined sources directly targets S31.

modules.name: AutoEnchant (enchant level reader)
modules.purpose: Read S31 properties 0-2 to determine the 3 enchantment levels offered. Pick the highest affordable one.
